## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

Fixes # <!-- issue number, if any -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / ability
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds and `build/` is updated (if JS changed)
- [ ] `npm run lint:js` and `php -l` pass
- [ ] **Plugin Check** reports no errors (`wp plugin check invocation`)
- [ ] New/changed abilities have an appropriate `permission_callback`
- [ ] Input is validated/sanitized and output is escaped
- [ ] Tested in the editor / via WP-CLI where relevant
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `readme.txt`) if behavior changed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything specific to look at, screenshots, edge cases, etc. -->
